meta.title: How To Make AI ASMR Cutting Videos - It’s Super Easy
meta.description:
Learn How To Make Satisfying AI ASMR Cutting videos with Google Veo3 
Tool I used 👉 https://openart.ai/home?ref=aiasmr

In this video I break down how to create viral ai asmr videos. These google veo 3 ai  fruit cutting videos have been all over my feed lately, so in this video I show you how to make ai asmr cutting videos yourself using OpenArt. 

Tip: Use Veo3 fast in text to video, it will save you some credits :) 

My prompts
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1JIZ-q6BlRPZ_31L-RbZxDGis9bt5s57nHa72XQ0eNmM/edit?usp=drivesdk
